energy: high in the morning, faded by 2pm

writing.notes: Good session. The chapter on Discipline and delay is coming together. The Marcus Aurelius material is stronger than I expected — the Meditations are full of him failing at exactly what he's writing about, which is the whole point.
writing.concern: I'm not sure the structure is right. Four books in the Virtues series means each one has to stand alone AND build on the others. Not sure Discipline does that yet.

bookstore.notes: Good foot traffic for a Monday. The cats were a hit with two families who came in. Need to reorder Meditations and Obstacles. Still short-staffed — the second hire interview is Wednesday.
bookstore.concern: Revenue last week was lighter than we need. February is slow everywhere but I keep doing the math in my head.

family.notes: Liam named a new goat. He wants to call it Marcus Aurelius. We compromised on Marcus. Theo fell asleep in the stroller halfway back from the mailbox.

daily_stoic_newsletter: Sent. On Seneca's letters about friendship. Felt genuine.
reading: Rereading Montaigne's essay on experience. Every time it's different.
